title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed

sections.title: Introduction and Model Overview
key_points: Nano Banana 2 (Gemini 3.1 Flash Image) combines Pro capabilities with Flash speed
Evolution from original Nano Banana (viral sensation) to Nano Banana Pro to current version
Brings advanced world knowledge and quality at lightning-fast speed

sections.title: Intelligence and Visual Quality Features
key_points: Advanced world knowledge powered by real-time web search information
Precision text rendering and translation capabilities
Can create infographics, diagrams, and data visualizations
Supports marketing mockups and localized content creation

sections.title: Enhanced Creative Control Capabilities
key_points: Subject consistency: maintain up to 5 characters and 14 objects in single workflow
Precise instruction following for complex requests
Visual fidelity upgrade with vibrant lighting, richer textures, sharper details

sections.title: Product Integration and Availability
key_points: Rolling out across Google products: Gemini app, Search, AI Studio + API, Google Cloud, Flow, Google Ads
Available in 141 new countries and territories, 8 additional languages
Different access levels for Pro vs standard subscribers
Zero credits required in Flow platform

sections.title: Provenance and AI Detection
key_points: SynthID technology combined with C2PA Content Credentials
SynthID verification used over 20 million times since November launch
Helps identify Google AI-generated images, video, and audio
C2PA verification coming to Gemini app

summary.title: Google DeepMind Launches Nano Banana 2: High-Speed AI Image Generation with Pro-Level Features
takeaways: Nano Banana 2 delivers Pro-level image generation capabilities at Flash model speed
Advanced features include subject consistency (5 characters, 14 objects), real-time web knowledge integration, and 4K resolution support
Wide rollout across Google ecosystem with different access tiers for various user types
Strong focus on AI provenance with SynthID and C2PA Content Credentials integration
actionable: Test Nano Banana 2 in Gemini app for rapid image generation workflows
Explore subject consistency features for character-based content creation
Utilize real-time web knowledge for accurate subject rendering
Implement SynthID verification for AI-generated content identification
Consider upgrading workflows from original Nano Banana to leverage new capabilities
